name: kwg_se_upload
description: Upload KWG search engine assignments to BrightEdge Mass Account KWG SE Upload

input_sources.mappings: Array of {identifier, account_id} pairs from credentials note — identifier is sheet name, filename, or null for single-account mode

outputs.success: Internal note posted confirming upload with KWG count per account
outputs.failure: Internal note posted with error details and next steps for agent

edge_cases: Multi-file: File: and Account ID labels required per file in credentials note
Multi-sheet Excel: Sheet: labels required per sheet
Single file with no labels: inferred automatically
SE IDs may be semicolon-separated in one cell or one per row — both handled
Upload timeout (10 min): note instructs agent to check BrightEdge manually
tsv_format: Login\tKWG\tSEs  (exact header — confirmed from sample file)
notes: DOM IDs on KWG SE page assumed to match keyword upload page — verify on first run
Response format (Updated KWGs =>) unverified — update _parse_kwg_se_response after first live run
